summary: Iteration 8 — Designer dashboard restructure (5 strict tabs + total PII privacy). Backend pytest 55/55 PASS in 25s against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (test_designer_restructure 2 NEW + 53 regression). Frontend Playwright covered every contract in the review_request.

new_tests: test_leads_endpoint_strips_phone_email_for_designer — PASS (designer list+detail both stripped, admin still has phone/email)
test_design_project_detail_includes_verification_pdfs — PASS (verification.pdf_urls properly attached and designer sees no email/mobile in customer blob)

frontend_results.login: designer@homesqre.com lands directly on /dashboard/designer with default hash #leads

active_projects.designer-active-floor-plan-0: absent on the selected legacy project (no verification_id) — pytest covers the positive contract via test_design_project_detail_includes_verification_pdfs

awaiting_approvals.note: Empty bucket in current seed data — locked-banner + uploader-absent behavior validated through code review of DesignerProjectsPanel (RenderUploader only renders when mode==='active')

completed.note: Empty bucket in current seed data — uploader is gated by mode==='active' so it is never rendered here

issues: 38 rows present — many are pytest fixture residue with no project_name (carry-over from iter5/6/7). Same advisory as iter7: consider hiding rows where !customer.project_name && images.length===0.

action_items: OPTIONAL CLEANUP: delete unused /app/frontend/src/components/admin/ApprovedFloorPlans.jsx (no importers, confirmed via grep). /app/frontend/src/components/admin/DesignerProjects.jsx is still imported by AdminDashboard so keep it for now.
OPTIONAL: filter pytest-residue 'Customer' rows out of Active Projects (cosmetic — carry-over from iter5/6/7).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend strips phone/email correctly for designer in both /api/leads and /api/leads/{id} (routes/leads.py lines 130-134 and 166-168). Admin unaffected — verified by pytest.

LeadOut schema correctly DROPS phone/email as declared fields (schemas/leads.py) so Pydantic doesn't re-inject them as nulls. `extra='allow'` lets admin responses still carry them. Clean implementation.

GET /api/admin/design/projects/{id} now attaches `verification` (pdf_url + pdf_urls + room_requirements + property_type + bhk_or_units) when the project has a linked verification_id — perfect for the designer download UI.
DesignerDashboard.jsx (54 lines) is small and clean. Mode-driven DesignerProjectsPanel keeps active/awaiting/completed in a single 348-line file (within the 700-line guideline).

RenderUploader correctly loops POST /api/admin/design/projects/{id}/images per file with a SHARED comment; counts successes, surfaces per-file errors via toast, and calls onUploaded only when at least 1 succeeded.
Awaiting/Completed detail views correctly omit <RenderUploader/> because it's gated by `mode === 'active'` — view-only, with awaiting showing the locked banner.
Customer PII (phone/email) never displayed — designer payload only shows customer.name + customer.project_name in both list and detail views.
Minor: /app/frontend/src/components/admin/ApprovedFloorPlans.jsx is now fully orphaned (no importer). Safe to delete in a future cleanup PR.
test_credentials: admin@homesqre.com / Homesqre@2026; designer@homesqre.com / Staff@2026; sales@homesqre.com / Staff@2026; designer-restructure-cust@homesqre.com / Pass@123; designer-restructure-des@homesqre.com / Pass@123 (seeded by test_designer_restructure.py).
seed_data_creation: test_designer_restructure.py auto-seeds 2 users at module scope. After the suite runs, leads collection has a 'PII Test' lead assigned to designer-restructure-des and a 'Restructure verif' design project with 2 floor-plan pdfs is created — useful for manual UI verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Designer dashboard now has 5 strict tabs: My Leads (read-only, no PII) | Verify Floor Plan (TabSiteVisits) | Active Projects (upload renders) | Awaiting Approvals (locked) | Completed (locked). The old 'Approved Floor Plans' tab and 'LeadInlinePanel' inside the detail view are gone — designer takes no manual lead actions. Backend strips phone/email from /api/leads* for designer role. /api/admin/design/projects/{id} now also attaches verification.pdf_urls so the designer can download floor plans straight from the detail view. Render upload loops one POST per file with a SHARED comment — after upload the project migrates Active → Awaiting Approvals on next refresh. All 12 review bullets GREEN.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — feature verification, no bugs.
